name: Movie Night
description: Join us for a special evening of family fun as we feature How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World (PG) under the stars.-Friday, March 6-Gates open at 6:00 pm | Movie begins at 6:30 pm-Baseball Fields – 226 Cypress Lane-Free popcorn provided by our Palm Springs Police Explorers!Bring your lawn chairs and blankets and come enjoy a fun, safe night with your community. We look forward to seeing you there!

name: Taco Fiesta
description: Save the Date: Saturday, March 7, 2026Village Athletic Complex – 226 Cypress Lane Get ready for:-Delicious tacos from local vendors-Live music & entertainment-Family-friendly activities-Cultural celebrationsMark your calendars now- this is one fiesta you won't want to miss! More details to come.

name: Taco Fiesta
description: Join the Village of Palm Springs for a fiesta that’s sure to spice up your weekend! It’s going to be a spec-taco-lar celebration filled with great food, live music, and community fun. -Delicious, flavor-packed tacos from local vendors-Live music to keep the fiesta going-Spirits and refreshing beverages-A lively atmosphere for the whole family -March 7, 2026-2:00–8:00 pm-226 Cypress Lane, Palm Springs, FL 33461-Free Admission Bring your friends, bring your family, and come hungry — this is one fiesta you won’t want to miss.
